Finance

Equity Research Initiation Report

Report | 22 Pages

An institutional sell-side equity research initiation of coverage report for publicly listed companies. Follows the standard research format from investment thesis through to financial forecasts, valuation, ESG assessment, and risks.

Ideal for sell-side analysts, buy-side research teams, and corporate finance professionals initiating coverage.

Contents

  1. Research Summary / Snapshot
  2. Investment Thesis
  3. Company Overview
  4. Industry & Competitive Landscape
  5. Business Model Analysis
  6. Financial Analysis
  7. Financial Forecasts & Model
  8. Valuation
  9. Peer Benchmarking
  10. ESG & Governance Assessment
  11. Key Risks
  12. Appendix
Equity Research Initiation Report. pdf
01
02
03

Create a free Associum account to access the complete document and additional templates.
